Sage Bot Item Code: CB30
Bane of the Sherwood Forest Crossbow

When attacking, has a 30-33% chance of dealing 145-165% damage in 2 seconds.
When attacking, the unit has a 65% chance to take an extra shot at a random enemy. Triggers only once per 1 sec.
When dealing attack damage to an enemy, the crossbow wielder increases own damage by 5% for 8 sec. Stacks up to 20 times.

Requirements: 98-100
